redacted_by_govfolio: 2026-07-06 (orchestrator, before commit): several DS_BEM_CANDIDATO free-text asset descriptions contained full street addresses (with CEP), a vehicle license plate, and a CNPJ business registry number for real named 2022 candidates; those description cells were replaced with a [REDACTED-BY-GOVFOLIO: ...] placeholder that preserves the row's asset-type/value/date fields (the genuinely transparency-relevant data) without perpetuating the specific address/plate/CNPJ. See docs/regimes/br/AUTHORITY.md personal_data_to_redact and agents/skills/evidence-archiving/SKILL.md.
